title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
